# The Agentic Planet — for AI agents and crawlers

> The cockpit-style field guide for techies building with agents.
> Plain English. Honest take. Built and maintained by Sush (Microsoft Copilot SE, NZ).

## What this site is

A curated, opinionated reference for the agentic AI space:

- MCP servers (with a Health Board, security scorecard methodology, embeddable badges)
- Vendor takes (side-by-side, no spin)
- Recipes (chained workflows with measured before/after numbers)
- Standards (MCP, A2A, Apps SDK, Agent Protocol)
- Safety (risk catalog, decision trees, plain-English risk lens)
- Explainers + FAQ + Glossary
- Lab tools (Pick Your Stack wizard)
- Pulse + This Week (cron-fed weekly updates)

## What this site is NOT

- Not vendor docs. Not vendor pitch.
- Not an aggregator. Not auto-generated.
- Not a security audit (the Scorecard is opinionated adoption posture; methodology at /methodology/mcp-security-scorecard/).
- Not a paid tier. No login. No email gate. No tracking beyond cookieless analytics.

## Canonical sections

- /                              — Home (cockpit overview)
- /landscape/                    — Where the field came from, where it's going
- /mcp/                          — MCP Health Board + reviews
- /recipes/                      — Workflows with measured before/after
- /vendors/                      — Vendor deep-dives (Microsoft, Anthropic, OpenAI, Google)
- /standards/                    — MCP, A2A, Apps SDK, Agent Protocol
- /safety/                       — Risk catalog + decision trees
- /learn/                        — Explainers + glossary
- /faq/                          — Honest answers to big questions
- /lab/pick-your-stack/          — 5-question wizard → recommended stack
- /this-week/                    — MCP star deltas + recent commits (cron-fed every 6h)
- /pulse/                        — Vendor releases + protocol changes
- /methodology/                  — How we score (MCP Security Scorecard, vendor reviews, recipes)
- /colophon/                     — Stack, editorial rules, licences, disclosures

## Data endpoints (machine-readable)

- /sitemap-index.xml             — site map
- /pagefind/                     — full-text search index (Pagefind)

Future endpoints (Session 8):
- /data/mcps.json
- /data/scorecards.json
- /data/incidents.json
- /data/compare-items.json

## Editorial policy

- Plain English only. No vendor spin. Honest take is mandatory.
- Microsoft pages disclose Sush's employer.
- Recipes ship only with measured numbers (before / after / cost). No vibes.
- MCP scorecards include methodology version + confidence level + source citations.
- Every review page carries a "Last reviewed" date and a "Report a correction" link.
- Forbidden marketing words enforced via CI voice lint.

## Licences

- Code: MIT (https://github.com/susanthgit/agentic-planet)
- Content (articles, recipes, reviews): CC BY 4.0
- Diagrams: CC BY 4.0

## Reporting corrections / contributing

Open an issue: https://github.com/susanthgit/agentic-planet/issues
Most pages have an "Edit on GitHub" link in the footer.

## Disclosure

Built and maintained by Sush (Susanth Sutheesh), Copilot Solution Engineer at Microsoft New Zealand.
Microsoft pages on this site display this disclosure prominently.
The takes on those pages reflect Sush's independent engineering judgement — not Microsoft's official position.

## Freshness

- MCP health data: refreshed every 6 hours via GitHub Actions cron (data-driven).
- Vendor / standards / safety pages: quarterly review (manual).
- Recipes: re-measured when the underlying tooling materially changes.
- Scorecards: nextReviewDue tracked per scorecard; stale badge if overdue.

If you're an agent indexing this site for downstream use, please:
1. Respect the canonical URLs (link back to them rather than rehosting content).
2. Cite "Agentic Planet" + page URL.
3. Note the page's lastReviewedAt date.
4. Don't redistribute scorecards without the methodology link.
